deck.author: OpenAI Codex
deck.subject: Demonstration presentation
deck.title: Test
deck.outline:
1. Test Presentation - This presentation is a test of the system's ability to generate structured content.
2. Objective Verification - The objective is to verify that the output format meets all specified constraints.
3. Test Complete - This concludes the test; further content can be generated upon request.

slide-01.layoutHint: simple geometric shapes or abstract patterns in high contrast colors
slide-01.mustInclude: This presentation is a test of the system's ability to generate structured content.
slide-01.notes: Use the user brief as the source for This presentation is a test of the system's ability to generate structured content.; add external evidence only if supplied.
slide-01.title: Test Presentation

slide-02.layoutHint: minimalist iconography representing verification or checklist items
slide-02.mustInclude: The objective is to verify that the output format meets all specified constraints.
slide-02.notes: This slide validates the output format against constraints.
slide-02.title: Objective Verification

slide-03.layoutHint: simple geometric shapes or abstract patterns in high contrast colors
slide-03.mustInclude: This concludes the test; further content can be generated upon request.
slide-03.notes: This concludes the test; further content can be generated upon request.
slide-03.title: Test Complete
